stream.$comment: Optional props if source is set to 'stream'.

gfn.$comment: Required props if source is set to 'gfn'.

local.$comment: DATE Phase 0.5 — defaults to omni-composer-streaming on :49100 (proven WebRTC video path). DATE Viewer on :49102 streams data channel (asset.open works) but video track silent — kit-app-template livestream 10.x vs SPA streaming-library 5.6.0 (built for livestream 9.x) compat issue under investigation. Use ?stream_port=49102 for DATE Viewer once video is unblocked.
